name: Template: Support Ticket Triage

parameters.subject: =Re: {{ $json.subject }} - We got this!
parameters.text:
=Hi there,

We received your message about {{ $json.subject }} and we're on it!

We know this is frustrating, and I want to personally make sure this gets resolved quickly. I've escalated this to our senior team and someone will be in touch within 1 hour.

Your ticket number is #{{ Math.floor(Math.random() * 10000) }}.

Best,
Support Team

parameters.subject: =Re: {{ $json.subject }}
parameters.text:
=Hi there,

Thanks for reaching out! I found something that might help:

{{ $json.kbSuggestion }}

If this doesn't solve your issue, just reply and a human will assist you shortly.

Best,
Support Team

description: AI-powered support ticket triage: sentiment analysis, urgency detection, and smart routing
